memes.label: Coconut Palm
memes.description: The coconut palm (Cocos nucifera) is the single most important plant species discovered on the island, providing the Robinson family with food, drink, vessels, fuel, and construction material.

memes.label: Colonialism
memes.description: The colonial worldview and practices reflected in the novel, including the family's settlement of the island and attitudes toward nature and indigenous peoples

memes.label: Courage
memes.description: Courage is a foundational virtue in The Swiss Family Robinson, manifested through physical bravery in the face of danger, moral fortitude in adversity, and the quiet resilience required to transform a wilderness into a home.

memes.label: Curiosity
memes.description: The intellectual drive to explore and understand the natural world, which the father cultivates as the foundation of his educational method

memes.label: Deliverance
memes.description: The recurring pattern of rescue from danger — both collective (the shipwreck) and individual (animal attacks) — interpreted as divine intervention

memes.label: Discovery
memes.description: Discovery is the driving narrative mechanism of The Swiss Family Robinson — a pattern of expedition, observation, and classification through which the family transforms an unknown island into a known and mastered domain.

memes.label: Domestic Economy
memes.description: The system of household production, resource management, and domestic organization that sustains the family's material life on the island

memes.label: Duty
memes.description: The moral framework of obligation — to God, family, and fellow humans — that governs the father's decisions and forms the ethical core of the novel

memes.label: Education
memes.description: The father's systematic approach to educating his sons through experience, observation, and moral instruction on the island

memes.label: Elizabeth
memes.description: The mother of the Robinson family, whose quiet courage, domestic industry, and steady faith sustain the household through every trial

memes.label: Ernest Robinson
memes.description: Ernest Robinson is the second son of the Robinson family, a bookish and intellectually curious twelve-year-old whose knowledge of natural history and philosophical disposition distinguish him from his more action-oriented brothers.

memes.label: Falconhurst
memes.description: The family's primary dwelling — a treehouse built in a massive tree — serving as their main home and the center of their island domestic life

memes.label: Franz
memes.description: The youngest Robinson son, approximately six years old, whose innocent questions and trusting faith provide occasions for theological instruction

memes.label: Fritz Robinson
memes.description: Fritz Robinson is the eldest of the four Robinson sons, a courageous and resourceful fifteen-year-old who serves as his father's primary companion on expeditions and the family's most skilled hunter.

memes.label: Gratitude
memes.description: The moral virtue of thankfulness to God and others, repeatedly emphasised by the father as the proper response to providential blessings

memes.label: Industry
memes.description: The moral virtue of diligent, productive labour that the father cultivates in his sons as essential to survival and Christian character

memes.label: Jack
memes.description: The third Robinson son — spirited, impulsive, and inventive — whose clever ideas and irrepressible energy contribute to the family's survival

memes.label: Jenny Montrose
memes.description: A young English woman shipwrecked on the island and rescued by Fritz, whose presence introduces a rare romantic subplot and the possibility of outside human contact

memes.label: Knips
memes.description: Knips is a young monkey adopted by the Robinson family during their early explorations, who becomes a beloved household pet and comic presence throughout their island sojourn.

memes.label: Natural History
memes.description: The 18th-century scientific discipline of observing, collecting, and classifying natural specimens, which provides much of the novel's encyclopedic content

memes.label: Patience
memes.description: The Christian virtue of waiting trustfully for divine timing, repeatedly urged by the father as essential to survival and spiritual maturity

memes.label: Ponto
memes.description: One of the family's two dogs, companion to Turk and loyal guardian of the Robinson settlements

memes.label: Potato
memes.description: The potato (Solanum tuberosum) is a vital cultivated food crop discovered by the Robinson family, providing a reliable staple that supplements the island's wild food resources.

memes.label: Prayer
memes.description: The family's daily practice of petitionary and thanksgiving prayer, which structures their spiritual life on the island

memes.label: Providence
memes.description: The religious theme of divine guidance, protection, and purpose that pervades The Swiss Family Robinson and shapes the family's response to their shipwreck and island life

memes.label: Robinson Crusoe
memes.description: The titular character of Defoe's novel, repeatedly referenced in The Swiss Family Robinson as both literary model and aspirational comparison for the family's island life

memes.label: Sabbath Observance
memes.description: The family's weekly practice of resting from labour and devoting Sunday to worship, reflecting Swiss Protestant Sabbath traditions

memes.label: Safety Bay
memes.description: Safety Bay (also called Providence Bay) is the sheltered coastal inlet where the Robinson family first lands after the shipwreck, serving as their primary maritime access point and the gateway to their island domain.

memes.label: Tent Encampment
memes.description: The tent encampment is the Robinson family's first shelter on the island — a makeshift construction of sailcloth and poles erected on the beach immediately after the shipwreck, serving as their home during the earliest phase of settlement.

memes.label: The Bear
memes.description: A formidable predator encountered during the family's inland expeditions, representing one of the few genuinely dangerous wild animals on the island

memes.label: The Buffalo
memes.description: Wild buffalo encountered and hunted by the Robinson family, providing meat, hide, and a memorable early demonstration of cooperative hunting tactics

memes.label: The Captain
memes.description: The unnamed captain of the wrecked vessel who abandons ship with the crew, leaving the Robinson family to fend for themselves

memes.label: The Crocodile
memes.description: An animal appearing through Jack's comic misidentification of a large iguana as a crocodile, leading to one of the novel's most memorable hunting episodes and a prized culinary acquisition

memes.label: The Eagle
memes.description: A young Malabar eagle captured and tamed by Fritz, who becomes the boy's prized hunting companion and a symbol of knighthood in the family's chivalric imaginings

memes.label: The Flamingo
memes.description: A magnificent pink bird captured alive by Fritz during the family's exploration of the marshlands, who becomes a beloved semi-domesticated companion around the homestead

memes.label: The Great Storm
memes.description: The Great Storm is a violent tropical weather event that tests the family's shelters and resolve during the rainy season, demonstrating both the island's dangers and the adequacy of their preparations.

memes.label: The Jackal
memes.description: A young jackal captured and raised by the Robinson boys, who becomes a semi-domesticated member of the family's growing menagerie of tamed wild animals

memes.label: The Kangaroo
memes.description: a marsupial encountered by the family that demonstrates the island's exotic and diverse fauna

memes.label: The Lion
memes.description: The lion, invoked throughout the narrative as the archetypal wild beast, represents the ultimate test of courage the family imagines but never directly encounters on the island

memes.label: The Lobster
memes.description: large crustaceans harvested from the island's shores that provide the family with delicious seafood

memes.label: The Penguin
memes.description: penguins found on a rocky island who become part of the family's poultry collection

memes.label: The Pinnace
memes.description: The Pinnace is the family's primary sailing vessel — a small but seaworthy boat used for salvage operations, coastal exploration, and maintaining the family's connection to the wreck and the wider sea.

memes.label: The Porcupine
memes.description: A crested porcupine encountered and killed by Jack on the family's first day ashore, providing quills for tools and meat for the family's first meal on the island

memes.label: The Serpent
memes.description: A persistent but unseen threat in the family's imagination, the serpent represents the hidden dangers of the island's interior that the family must navigate with vigilance and faith

memes.label: The Shark
memes.description: A massive shark killed by Fritz at Safety Bay, interpreted by the father as both a providential deliverance and a source of useful materials

memes.label: The Shipwreck
memes.description: The shipwreck is the catastrophic opening event of the novel — a violent storm that strands the Robinson family on an unknown tropical island and initiates their six-year saga of survival and settlement.

memes.label: The Tiger
memes.description: one of the most dangerous predators on the island, representing the apex of wild nature the family must confront

memes.label: The Tortoise
memes.description: Large tortoises found on the island that provide the Robinson family with meat and valuable shell material for crafting tools and containers

memes.label: The Vessel
memes.description: The Vessel is the shipwrecked sailing ship that carried the Robinson family from Europe — a stranded hulk that becomes both the source of their early survival materials and a haunting monument to their former lives.

memes.label: The Whale
memes.description: A marine giant discussed by the family as both a potential threat and a source of useful materials, appearing primarily in their natural history discourse and in an episode of mistaken identity involving Jack

memes.label: Turk
memes.description: Turk is one of the family's two dogs, an English breed who serves as a loyal hunting companion and guardian throughout the Robinsons' island sojourn.

memes.label: William
memes.description: The father, narrator, and moral center of The Swiss Family Robinson — a Swiss pastor who leads his family through shipwreck and island survival
